sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113958" key="xqono/plastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χθονό-πλαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113958.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">formed of earth,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
